title: Integrate OpenAI API in Next.js (streaming chat)
summary: Add OpenAI API with streaming chat responses to Next.js App Router using the official openai SDK, a streaming API route, and a client-side chat hook.
declaration: I will integrate the OpenAI API into this Next.js project with streaming chat responses using the official openai Node.js SDK. This covers a chat API route, streaming to the client, a reusable hook, and a chat UI component. If you prefer the Vercel AI SDK abstraction (useChat hook), say so before I begin.
